message: `onContextmenu` is not a supported virtual-dom event property.
Use a `text(...)` child instead of a `text` property on an element node.
Omit `title` instead of assigning a nullish value.
Add an `alt` attribute to this virtual-dom image.
`ariaActiveDescendant` is not a valid virtual-dom ARIA property.
`loud` is not a valid value for `ariaLive`.
Add an accessible name to this virtual-dom `Button` control.
Use `TabIndex.*` instead of a raw tabIndex number.
Use a `tabIndex` of 0 or -1 instead of a positive value.
Use a `ClassNames.*` constant instead of a literal `className`.
Use a named event listener constant instead of a raw numeric id.
Add an explicit `childCount` to this virtual-dom node.
